en_title: MMORPG AION 2 Announces September Global Release Date
subtitle: 36倍世界，200个地下城
opus_summary: NCsoft宣布《永恒之塔2》9月全球上线。本作采用Unreal Engine 5开发，世界规模是前作的36倍，拥有近200个地下城和丰富PvP内容，支持PC平台。

paragraphs.en: MMORPG AION: The Tower of Eternity first launched in 2008 and drew in millions of players with its magical world and its focus on flight and aerial combat. In 2018, developer NC announced it was working on AION 2, a free-to-play sequel that promised to expand on the foundation laid by its predecessor. And on Friday, NC announced that it’s only a few months away: AION 2 will be releasing simultaneously worldwide in September of this year.
paragraphs.cn: MMORPG《永恒之塔》于2008年首次上线，凭借其魔法世界和对飞行与空战的侧重吸引了数百万玩家。2018年，开发商NCsoft宣布正在开发免费续作《永恒之塔2》，承诺在前作基础上进行扩展。上周五，NCsoft宣布距离上线仅剩数月：《永恒之塔2》将于今年9月全球同步发售。

paragraphs.en: The original AION was built in Crytek’s CryEngine, which the dev team had to significantly rewrite to make it work for an MMORPG. But this time, AION 2 has been built from the ground up in Unreal Engine 5, overhauling the visuals and allowing the dev team much more freedom to realize their full vision.
paragraphs.cn: 初代《永恒之塔》采用Crytek的CryEngine开发，开发团队不得不对其进行大量重写才能适配MMORPG。但这一次，《永恒之塔2》从头开始使用Unreal Engine 5构建，彻底革新了视觉效果，让开发团队拥有更多自由来实现他们的完整愿景。

paragraphs.en: Where that freedom is most obvious is in the size of the world, which is 36 times bigger than the first game. Not only is the world itself larger, but the regions within it have also grown and are fully open world. Each region is built with verticality in mind, with full flight traversal, and the regions connect into one open world that rewards exploration.
paragraphs.cn: 这种自由最明显的体现就是世界规模，比初代游戏大36倍。不仅世界本身更大，其中的区域也得到扩展，并且是完全开放世界。每个区域都考虑了垂直性设计，支持全程飞行穿越，各区域连接成一个鼓励探索的开放世界。

paragraphs.en: AION 2 takes place 200 years after the original and includes regions that fans of the first game will recognize, remade for a larger world. However, the passage of time means these regions have changed quite a bit. Time has also caused Aether to grow more and more rare, making it difficult for Daevas to survive. Aether is the essence that allowed humans to turn into more powerful Daevas, and you play as one of them. So even if you’re experienced with the world of AION, the world has changed enough that you’ll find it a new and dangerous place.
paragraphs.cn: 《永恒之塔2》的故事发生在初代200年后，包含前作粉丝会认出的区域，但为更大的世界进行了重制。然而，时间的流逝意味着这些区域发生了很大变化。时间也让奥德（Aether）变得越来越稀有，使得守护者（Daevas）难以生存。奥德是让人类转变为更强大守护者的精华，而玩家扮演的就是守护者。因此，即使你对《永恒之塔》的世界很熟悉，这个世界也已经发生了足够多的变化，你会发现它是一个崭新而危险的地方。

paragraphs.en: Combat has expanded and evolved from the original game’s foundation. It’s fast paced with no auto attacking, so you’ll be manually using real-time targeting and attacking. Your character’s skill set is based on the class you choose, and each class’s role is more distinct this time and designed to encourage more synergy with your fellow party members.
paragraphs.cn: 战斗系统在初代基础上进行了扩展和进化。节奏快速，没有自动攻击，因此你需要手动进行实时锁定和攻击。角色的技能组取决于你选择的职业，这次每个职业的角色更加鲜明，旨在鼓励与队友之间更多的协同配合。

paragraphs.en: There will be eight classes at launch. Gladiator is a tank-bruiser hybrid, Templar is the classic frontline tank, Assassin and Ranger are fast attacking DPS, Sorcerer specializes in burst damage, Spiritmaster commands spirits to control the fight, Cleric is the primary healer, and Chanter is a buff-and-heal hybrid. Neither of those last two are purely support classes, though. Both blend their healing and utility with DPS skills.
paragraphs.cn: 上线时将提供八个职业。剑星是坦克与狂战士的混合体，守护星是经典的前排坦克，杀星和弓星是快速攻击的输出职业，魔道星专精爆发伤害，精灵星指挥精灵控制战斗，治愈星是主要治疗者，护法星是增益与治疗的混合体。不过，后两者并非纯粹的治疗职业，它们都将治疗和辅助功能与输出技能相结合。

paragraphs.en: There’s a ton of both PvE and PvP content for you to fight your way through. For PvE fans, there are almost 200 dungeons, each of which have a unique feature or mechanic you’ll need to deal with. You can tackle them solo or in parties of four or eight, and co-op dungeons will require that you think about your party’s combinations of classes. There are also field events ranging from small encounters to huge clashes.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏拥有大量PvE和PvP内容供你挑战。对于PvE爱好者，有近200个地下城，每个都有独特的特性或机制需要应对。你可以单人挑战，也可以组成4人或8人队伍，合作地下城需要你考虑队伍的职业技能搭配。此外还有从小型遭遇战到大规模冲突的野外事件。

paragraphs.en: If you’re more interested in PvP, there are several different modes that scratch that itch. There are arenas for 1v1 duels and 4v4 team battles, 8v8 battlefields, as well as massive, cross-server realm vs. realm battles for dozens of players at once. The faction-based Abyss from the original AION also returns, where you can fly across open areas and fight for control of contested territory.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你对PvP更感兴趣，有几种不同的模式可以满足你。有1v1决斗和4v4团队战的竞技场、8v8战场，以及支持数十名玩家同时参与的大规模跨服阵营战。初代《永恒之塔》中基于阵营的深渊模式也将回归，你可以在开阔区域飞行，争夺争议领土的控制权。

paragraphs.en: For the fashion forward among you, AION 2 also has an extensive character customization system with more than 200 options to get your look just right. Or if you see someone whose look you want, head to the Style Shop, where players can upload their combination of customizations to the official website. Find a look you like, download it, and apply it to your own character.
paragraphs.cn: 对于注重外观的玩家，《永恒之塔2》还拥有丰富的角色自定义系统，提供超过200个选项来打造你的完美造型。如果你看到别人的造型很喜欢，可以前往风格商店，玩家可以将自己的自定义组合上传到官方网站。找到你喜欢的造型，下载并应用到你的角色上。

paragraphs.en: For the collectors, the versatile pet system hunt monsters to collect their souls and unlock them as pets. These double as mounts, each with their animations and movements.
paragraphs.cn: 对于收藏家来说，多功能的宠物系统可以狩猎怪物收集其灵魂，并将其解锁为宠物。这些宠物同时也可作为坐骑，每个都有独特的动画和移动方式。

paragraphs.en: AION 2 will be available worldwide in September on PC only, through either Steam or PURPLE . To keep up with the latest news and updates, you can check out the game’s official website or stay tuned to IGN.
paragraphs.cn: 《永恒之塔2》将于9月在PC平台全球发售，可通过Steam或PURPLE平台获取。要了解最新消息和更新，可以查看游戏官方网站或关注IGN。
